description: Bridge between Rosetta-Shape-Core shapes and Geometric-to-Binary-Computational-Bridge physics encoders. Each encoder translates a physical domain into octahedral states (3 bits), providing a physical sensing layer underneath the emotional and truth-sensor layers.

encoding_model.description: Physical signals → domain-specific encoder → octahedral state (3 bits) → shape bridge
encoding_model.output_format: 3-bit vertex encoding (000-111) mapping to 8 geometric positions on SHAPE.OCTA

encoders.physics: Stefan-Boltzmann law, Wien displacement, Fourier heat conduction
encoders.rationale: Thermal energy is fire — tetrahedron's primary domain. Wien's law (λT=b) gives each temperature a spectral fingerprint.
encoders.example: 310K body temperature → Wien peak 9.4µm → octa state 3 (stable, not ground)

encoders.domain: Magnetic fields, Zeeman splitting, spin states
encoders.physics: Zeeman basis read/write at 0.3-5 THz, tetrahedral-octahedral hybrid lattice at 109.47°
encoders.rationale: Magnetic encoding directly uses octahedral geometry — 6 vertices map to field directions. F10 (Particle) is primary to ICOSA but activates secondarily through OCTA's physical Zeeman basis.
encoders.example: External B-field → Zeeman split → 3-bit state encoding → vertex on OCTA

encoders.domain: Electric fields, voltage gradients, bioelectric signals
encoders.rationale: Electric potential drives reactions (activation energy). Tetrahedron's fire/reaction families. Bioelectric signals (like electric eel) use oscillation encoding.
encoders.example: Membrane depolarization → voltage spike → octa state 4 (high contrast, compressed)

encoders.domain: Mechanical pressure, stress tensors, acoustic pressure
encoders.physics: Pascal's law, bulk modulus, stress-strain relations
encoders.rationale: Pressure is force on structure — cube's containment families. Structural integrity under load is cube's core function.
encoders.example: Hydrostatic pressure → isotropic compression → octa state 0 (spherical ground)

encoders.domain: Acoustic waves, frequency spectra, beat patterns
encoders.physics: Fourier decomposition, resonance frequency ω₀=√(k/m), beat frequency |f₁-f₂|
encoders.rationale: Sound is oscillation — resonance is F01, icosahedron's first family. Fourier decomposition reveals harmonic structure. 40Hz gamma-band beat frequencies linked to neural binding.
encoders.example: 40Hz binaural beat → beat frequency encoding → octa state 5 (biaxial, two equal axes)

encoders.physics: Malus's law, fringe visibility V, wavelength-dependent encoding
encoders.rationale: Light coherence (V≈0.9) signals phase-lock — resonance. Wavelength carries information (F03). Polarization is a symmetry selection.
encoders.example: 532nm coherent light, V=0.9 → octa state 0 (ground, max φ-coherence)

encoders.domain: Gravitational fields, tidal forces, orbital mechanics
encoders.physics: Newton's law, Kepler's laws, geodesics in curved spacetime
encoders.rationale: Gravity is the cosmic-scale force — dodecahedron's Earth-Cosmos family (F07). Orbital mechanics and geodesics map to navigation (F15) principles.
encoders.example: Tidal force gradient → anisotropic deformation → octa state 1 (elongated along dominant axis)

encoders.physics: Superposition principle, Huygens' principle, wave equation
encoders.rationale: Waves are the universal carrier. Interference patterns encode topology (F20). Superposition maps to icosahedron's 20-face information capacity.
encoders.example: Double-slit interference → fringe pattern → octa state 6 (diagonal superposition)

encoders.physics: Navier-Stokes vorticity, Kolmogorov cascade, Reynolds number
encoders.rationale: Vortices are the geometry of turbulent flow — icosahedron carries both Flow (F02) and Turbulence (F17) families.
encoders.example: High Reynolds number → turbulent cascade → octa state 5 (low φ-coherence, chaotic)

encoders.physics: Arrhenius equation, reaction kinetics, enzyme catalysis
encoders.rationale: Chemical reactions are fire transformations — F13 (Reaction) is primary to TETRA. F04 (Life, primary: DODECA) activates secondarily through sustained catalytic cycles.
encoders.example: Enzyme-substrate binding → Michaelis-Menten kinetics → octa state 2 (high-entropy search for substrate)

encoders.domain: Integrated information, neural binding, global workspace
encoders.physics: Integrated Information Theory (Φ), free energy principle, neural synchronization
encoders.rationale: Consciousness maps to dodecahedron's principles layer — integrated information (Φ) quantifies irreducibility of causal architecture. P12 Unity is the target state.
encoders.example: High Φ + gamma synchrony → octa state 0 (ground state, max integration)

encoders.domain: PAD coordinates, sensor co-activation, octahedral state mapping
encoders.physics: PAD compression (22 sensors → 3 floats → 8 states), φ-coherence model
encoders.rationale: The emotion encoder is the PAD→octahedral mapping itself. F06 (Cognition, primary: DODECA) and F16 (Consciousness, primary: DODECA) both activate secondarily through OCTA as the computational bridge between all encoders and the emotional layer.
encoders.example: PAD(0.80, 0.10, 0.50) → octa state 0 → coherence sensor → ground state

silicon_encoder.description: Physical implementation of octahedral state encoding in silicon
silicon_encoder.encoding: 3-bit per unit cell, tetrahedral-octahedral hybrid lattice at 109.47°

octahedral_state_encoding.description: Canonical 8-state encoding on SHAPE.OCTA vertices. Each state maps to a 3-bit vertex, eigenvalue triple, Gray code, φ-coherence score, and Mandala angle. Source: mappings/octahedral_state_encoding.json.

rosetta_hooks.SHAPE.OCTA: 8 states map to 8 faces of octahedron

computational_layer.description: Geometric computation capabilities built on octahedral encoding. Includes GEIS (encoding runtime), Engine (solvers/optimizers), Negentropic (consciousness metrics), and geometric_intelligence (research framework).

GEIS.description: Geometric Encoding Intelligence System — octahedral state management, tensor operations, geometric sensing

Engine.description: Geometric computation engine — symmetry detection, constraint solving, annealing, SIMD optimization
Engine.principle_link: PRINCIPLE.P01 — symmetry_detector.py implements the first principle computationally

Negentropic.description: Negentropic computation — consciousness metric M(S), alignment thermodynamics, empirical auditing
Negentropic.caveat: Core physics established; consciousness metric M(S) is theoretical — empirical validation pending

geometric_intelligence.description: Research framework — resonance sensors, curiosity engine, constraint agent, protection engine, zero-knowledge proofs
geometric_intelligence.novel_capability: geometric_zk.py — zero-knowledge geometric proofs (no Rosetta parallel yet)

modules.experiments: Geometric factorization, holographic smoothness, number-theoretic energy functions

sensor_suite.note: Independent sensor channels operate simultaneously; composition happens at higher level without collapsing sensor plurality
